name: RABBIT-SPEC-BACKLOG-8
title: spec.md 'Out of Scope' line names 'the TDD subagent's job' — marginal process coupling
description: spec.md 'Out of Scope' section line 70 says 'that is the TDD subagent's job'. While this is framed as a scope boundary statement (which is acceptable), it names a specific downstream owner. Conservative improvement: replace with 'out of this skill's scope' to remove the coupling, similar to how contract.md's process-agnostic principle works. Low priority since it's accurate today; flag for review if the TDD subagent is ever renamed or replaced.
